questions.question: In LangChain, what decorator marks a Python function as an agent tool?
questions.explanation: The @tool decorator from langchain.tools wraps a Python function with a name and description so the LLM can discover and invoke it.

questions.question: Which tool would you give an agent that needs to search the internet?
options: Tavily Search or similar web search API
questions.explanation: Tavily Search (or alternatives like SerpAPI or DuckDuckGo) provides real-time web search results that the agent can query during task execution.

questions.question: How does an agent signal it has finished its task?
options: It produces a final answer instead of calling another tool
questions.explanation: When the agent determines it has enough information, it stops calling tools and instead writes a final answer directly to the user.
